content: - Accuracy: around 0.84 (exact may vary based on random seed) - Classification Report: includes precision, recall, and F1-score for each class - Confusion Matrix: helps visualize true/false positives and negatives 4. Screenshots of Flask Application Screenshot of the Flask web interface can be inserted here manually in the final document. 5. Reflection What Worked:

- Flask app allows user-friendly predictions - Form-based interface ensures easy input What Didn t: - Original model used too many features; had to retrain for compatibility with web UI - Ensuring input feature alignment required careful restructuring Future Improvements: - Add more features to improve accuracy - Implement model explainability (e.g., SHAP values) - Improve UI with dropdowns and data validation - Deploy online using services like Heroku or Render
